title: microtoena praineana
intro: Microtoena praineana, also known as Praine's mint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Microtoena praineana include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include tea, essential oil, and infusions, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties.
